canonical_answer: A woman with dark hair pulled back wears a blue cardigan and grey gloves while standing beside a white top-loading washing machine. A black toolbox sits on a surface to her right, and a white thermostat is mounted on the wall behind her. The logo for Point & Click Appliance Repair appears in the top left corner.
